description: Mobile-first Klondike Solitaire (the classic Windows / iOS solitaire variant). 7 tableau columns, 4 foundations, stock+waste with 3-card flip. Tap a card to auto-move to its foundation if legal (saves a long drag). Persists state of best score in localStorage. Fully Lego-composed: imports entities.solitaire-klondike verbatim. Touch-only via pointerup, mob-001..016 mobile wisdom applied.
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.solitaire. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of SolitaireKlondike + CARD_SYMBOLS (verbatim, marker present), (2) full game UI: 7 tableau cols + 4 foundations + stock + waste (with 3-card fan), (3) tap-to-auto-foundation on waste/tableau top cards (saves long drags on mobile), (4) undo button (uses Lego's 30-snapshot history), (5) score/moves stats + dedicated New Game / Undo buttons, (6) face-up cards show top-left + bottom-right corner pips with center suit symbol; face-down cards use card-back gradient, (7) win overlay (mac-022 web equivalent), (8) felt-green table aesthetic with translucent slot outlines for empty piles, (9) suit-symbol watermark on empty foundation slots so player knows which is which. NOTE: drag-and-drop UX deliberately scaled back in this template — tap-to-auto-foundation handles the most common gold-rush moves and avoids the complexity of pointermove drag-cascade rendering. Caller can extend by adding pointerdown→pointermove→pointerup drag with grid.moveFromTableau/moveFromWaste calls.

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to fill the Solitaire/Klondike genre gap. Validates that complex card games NEED a template seed — first solitaire canary fired with Lego-only-no-template produced a 794-line freehand monolith with NO marker (recipe ignored). Lego + recipe + template is the gold-star path. AntiKeywords disambiguate from spider/freecell/blackjack/poker/memory-match neighboring card genres.
